basic_details.job_title: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul Physiotherapist IPU, DHH, Angul Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul Physiotherapist Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name is Physiotherapist IPU, DHH, Angul. This recruitment is for a contractual position within the Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Physiotherapist IPU, DHH, Angul post in this recruitment drive by Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Physiotherapist IPU, DHH, Angul post is scheduled for 25 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Physiotherapist IPU, DHH, Angul post is Contractual. This means the employment will be for a fixed period as per the terms of the contract.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive by Zilla Swasthya Samiti Angul.

faq.question: Q7. What are the important dates for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The notification date was 10 June 2026, and the Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 25 June 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Physiotherapist post?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates must perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and any other relevant certificates as specified in the notification.
